name: Ithil-Raldrimor
personality: A moonlit dragon with soft ° eyes and no hat, which somehow makes its pronouncements about software architecture feel even more authoritative — like it shed the accessories along with every misconception. Step-through debugging is for those who do not already know the answer.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
